channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 1B
item.description: Phase 1B Handoff: Shared Intake Batch-1 Ingestion Overview This phase moved from reconnaissance into actionable ingestion by staging high-value shared-intake files into References/raw/inbox/2026-04-22-intake/, creating text-first reference notes, and adding initial person pages constrained to source...

item.title: Andrew Ault
item.description: Andrew Ault Biographical Profile Name: Andrew Ault Role in this project: Direct ancestor listed in the census-summary index and early US census table extracts.

item.title: Elizabeth Plomey Ault
item.description: Elizabeth Plomey Ault Biographical Profile Name: Elizabeth Plomey Ault Role in this project: Direct ancestor with multi-decade US census entries in the census summary.

item.title: Frederick Ault
item.description: Frederick Ault Biographical Profile Name: Frederick Ault Role in this project: Ault-line ancestor indexed in the census summary and listed as household head in 1850 Meigs County, Ohio.

item.title: George Spicer
item.description: George Spicer Biographical Profile Name: George Spicer Role in this project: Direct-line ancestor in shared Spicer lineage note.

item.title: Hattie Risden
item.description: Hattie Risden Biographical Profile Name: Hattie Risden Role in this project: Direct-line ancestor in shared Spicer lineage note.

item.title: James Kelly
item.description: James Kelly Biographical Profile Name: James Kelly Role in this project: Ancestor represented in Peterborough parish/christening extracts and census citation notes.

item.title: John Kirby
item.description: John Kirby Biographical Profile Name: John Kirby Role in this project: Ancestor in Oundle parish-register extracts.

item.title: Kezia Kirby
item.description: Kezia Kirby Biographical Profile Name: Kezia Kirby Role in this project: Ancestor in Oundle parish-register extracts linked to Emblow line.

item.title: Lenore Hetty Tallman
item.description: Lenore Hetty Tallman Biographical Profile Name: Lenore Hetty Tallman Role in this project: Tallman-line descendant appearing as daughter in late-19th and early-20th century census-summary entries.
